CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, text STRING);
SELECT right(text, 4) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT right(text, 3) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT right(text, 7) FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT right(text, 0) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT right(text, LENGTH(text)) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT right(text, LENGTH(text) - 1) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT t1.text, right(t1.text, 2) FROM test_strings t1 JOIN (SELECT text FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3) t2 ON right(t1.text, 3) = right(t2.text, 3);
SELECT right(text, CASE WHEN id = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END) FROM test_strings;
SELECT CONCAT(right(text, 2), ' is the outcome') FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(text) > 3;
